## Organization
name: U.S.S. Agency
legal_name: Ultimate Security Services LLC
type: Security Company
founded: 2008
license: Florida License B2800082
headquarters: 450 S Orange Avenue, 3rd Floor, Orlando, FL 32801
phone: 1-800-508-8772
phone_local: 321-304-2430
email: support@ussagency.com
website: https://www.ussagency.com
hours: 24/7/365

## Key Facts
- 18+ years in business (founded 2008)
- Florida Licensed & Insured (B2800082)
- 635+ verified Google reviews (5.0 stars)
- 24/7/365 availability
- Armed officers hold Florida Class G license
- Background-checked, drug-tested officers
- Minority-owned security company
